title: Kardia Lexicon Lexeme Map Entry
description: Maps a Strong's ID to its Hebrew thought category

strongs_id.description: Strong's ID. H prefix for Hebrew, G prefix for Greek.

original_script.description: Word in its original script characters.

lxx_source_hebrew.description: For Greek entries: Strong's H ID of the Hebrew word this Greek renders in the LXX. Proves Hebrew category continuity into the NT.

category_confidence.description: primary = almost always carries this category. partial = significant overlap. contextual = context governs.

usage_notes.description: How this lexeme carries the Hebrew category.

exceptions.description: Cases where this lexeme does NOT carry the category mapping.
